basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) has officially announced the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II Recruitment 2026 with 2 vacancies. The detailed notification was published in 2026 at the sgpgims.org.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 50 years and hold a recognized medical qualification as per IMC Act/NMC Act 2019 along with a Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty and 3 years of post-PG experience are eligible to apply. The application process is offline and will remain open until 17-07-2026, and candidates can refer to the off

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC as per UP Govt rules; 5 years for UP Govt employees with 3 years service; ex-servicemen as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Recognized medical qualification as per IMC Act/NMC Act 2019, Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty, Three years experience after PG diploma
qualification.details: Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II (General Medicine) & Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II (General Surgeon): A recognized medical qualification included in the First or Second Schedule or Part II of the Third Schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (Now National Medical Commission Act-2019). Postgraduate Degree or diploma in the concerned specialty. Three years experience in concerned specialty after obtaining the postgraduate diploma.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sgpgims.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.sanjay_gandhi_postgraduate_institute_of_: Recognized medical qualification as per IMC Act/NMC Act 2019, Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty, Three years experience after PG diploma

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SGPGIMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SGPGIMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II (General Medicine) & Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II (General Surgeon): A recognized medical qualification included in the First or Second Schedule or Part II of the Third Schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (Now National Medical Commission Act-2019). Postgraduate Degree or diploma in the concerned specialty. Three years experience in concerned specialty after obtaining the postgraduate diploma.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC as per UP Govt rules; 5 years for UP Govt employees with 3 years service; ex-servicemen as per rules.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.sgpgims.org.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II recruitment is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II in the Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a recognized medical qualification as per IMC Act/NMC Act 2019, a Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty, and three years of experience after obtaining the postgraduate diploma.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per UP Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,08,700 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for SGPGIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these posts is Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226014.
